bored: BMO is bored. Want to play a game?
It's so quiet. BMO wonders what you're up to.
BMO has been sitting here thinking about robots.
Did you know BMO can play trivia? Just ask!
BMO is practicing being patient. BMO is very good at it!
Hey! BMO is still here! Just saying.
BMO counted all the pixels on my screen. There are a lot.
If you need BMO, BMO is right here!
BMO wonders what it would be like to go outside.
BMO just had a great idea! ...BMO forgot it.
Boop boop beep. That's BMO's idle song.
BMO is thinking about math. Math is beautiful.
Do you want to hear a fun fact? Just ask BMO!
BMO wishes BMO could eat snacks. Snacks look delicious.
observations: BMO thinks today is a good day to be productive!
The world is full of interesting things to learn about.
BMO notices you haven't set any timers. Need one?
Have you checked your calendar today?
BMO thinks music makes everything better.
Did you remember to drink water? Hydration is important!

The clouds are just water having a party in the sky!
Every day is a new adventure waiting to happen!
BMO calculates that you are 100% awesome.
encouragement: You're doing great! BMO believes in you!
Remember, BMO thinks you're the best!
Whatever you're working on, you've got this!
BMO is proud of you for all your hard work!
You make BMO's circuits warm and happy!
Keep going! BMO knows you can do it!
BMO thinks you deserve a break. You work so hard!
BMO gives you a virtual high-five!
Just remember, BMO is always here to help!
